definition: Open to more than one interpretation.
example: The ending of the story was deliberately ambiguous.
exampleTranslation: كانت نهاية القصة غامضة عن قصد.

definition: Genuine or true, rather than copied or invented.
example: The restaurant serves authentic regional food.

definition: Logical, consistent, and easy to understand.
example: She presented a coherent argument.

definition: Evoking strong interest or convincing attention.
example: The evidence made a compelling case.

definition: Giving useful information clearly and in few words.
example: Keep the introduction concise.

definition: Showing careful and persistent effort.
example: He was diligent in checking every detail.
exampleTranslation: كان دؤوبًا في تدقيق كل تفصيل.

definition: Difficult to find, catch, achieve, or remember.
example: A simple answer remained elusive.
exampleTranslation: ظل الوصول إلى إجابة بسيطة صعبًا.

arabic: تعاطُف؛ قدرة على فهم مشاعر الآخرين
definition: The ability to understand and share another person's feelings.
example: Good leaders listen with empathy.

definition: To improve the quality, value, or strength of something.
example: Context can enhance your understanding of a word.
exampleTranslation: يمكن للسياق أن يعزّز فهمك للكلمة.

definition: Possible and practical to do successfully.
example: We need a feasible plan for the first release.
exampleTranslation: نحتاج إلى خطة قابلة للتنفيذ للإصدار الأول.

definition: Lasting for only a very short time.
example: It was a fleeting thought.

definition: To make it difficult for something to happen or progress.
example: Too many steps can hinder adoption.
exampleTranslation: قد تعيق كثرة الخطوات تبنّي المنتج.

definition: A clear and deep understanding of something.
example: The interview offered valuable insight.

definition: Showing very careful attention to detail.
example: She kept meticulous notes.

definition: A subtle distinction in meaning, expression, or sound.
example: Translation can miss the nuance of a phrase.
exampleTranslation: قد تفوّت الترجمة الدلالة الدقيقة لعبارة ما.

definition: Either of the two yearly points when the Sun reaches its greatest distance north or south of the equator.
example: The winter solstice is the shortest day of the year.
exampleTranslation: الانقلاب الشتوي هو أقصر يوم في السنة.

definition: A person or thing that leads a group, sets the speed, or establishes a standard for others.
example: The company became a pace-setter for the industry.
exampleTranslation: أصبحت الشركة رائدة تحدد وتيرة القطاع.

definition: Something eaten to provide nourishment.
example: Fresh food was prepared for the journey.

definition: Food eaten at a regular time or on a particular occasion.
example: They shared a meal after work.

definition: Food of a particular kind, especially what is served in a restaurant or place.
example: The café serves simple local fare.

definition: Food or other substances needed for health and growth.
example: The meal provided much-needed nourishment.
exampleTranslation: وفّرت الوجبة الغذاء الذي كانت هناك حاجة شديدة إليه.

definition: A series of contests in which competitors play to determine a winner.
example: The team reached the tournament final.

definition: Organized series of contests held to determine winners.
example: The club competes in several tournaments each year.
exampleTranslation: ينافس النادي في عدة بطولات كل عام.

arabic: في النهاية؛ في نهاية المطاف؛ أخيرًا
definition: Finally, after everything has been considered or has happened.
example: Ultimately, the choice belongs to the user.
exampleTranslation: في نهاية المطاف، يعود الخيار إلى المستخدم.

definition: Based on a new idea or method being tested rather than established practice.
example: The team enabled the experimental feature.

definition: Relating to calculation or the use of computers to solve problems.
example: The research uses computational methods.

definition: Continuing firmly despite difficulty or delay.
example: Persistent practice builds confidence.

definition: Dealing with problems in a practical rather than theoretical way.
example: We chose a pragmatic solution.

definition: Very great, intense, or showing deep insight.
example: The book had a profound influence on her.

definition: Able to recover quickly from difficulty or change.
example: Children can be remarkably resilient.
exampleTranslation: يمكن للأطفال أن يكونوا قادرين على التعافي بدرجة لافتة.

definition: Not immediately obvious; delicate or understated.
example: There is a subtle difference between the two expressions.

definition: To grow, develop, or succeed well.
example: People thrive when learning feels rewarding.
exampleTranslation: يزدهر الناس عندما يكون التعلم مجزيًا.

definition: Able to adapt to many different functions or activities.
example: It is a versatile tool for language learners.
exampleTranslation: إنها أداة متعددة الاستخدامات لمتعلمي اللغات.

definition: A phrasal verb with several context-dependent meanings.

senses.definition: For an aircraft, to leave the ground and begin flying.

examples.sourceText: The plane will take off at noon.
Our flight took off on time.

senses.definition: To remove clothing or something being worn.

examples.sourceText: Please take off your shoes at the door.

senses.definition: To become popular or successful very quickly.

examples.sourceText: The new product began to take off.
examples.translation: بدأ المنتج الجديد يحقق نجاحًا سريعًا.

definition: To meet someone unexpectedly or encounter a problem.
example: We ran into an unexpected problem.

definition: To understand something or find a solution.
example: She figured out how the feature worked.
exampleTranslation: توصّلت إلى فهم كيفية عمل الميزة.

definition: To stay at the same level or pace as someone or something.
example: It is difficult to keep up with every new term.
exampleTranslation: من الصعب مواكبة كل مصطلح جديد.

term: hit the nail on the head
definition: To describe a situation or identify a problem exactly.
example: Your explanation hit the nail on the head.

definition: To make people feel more comfortable at the start of a conversation.
example: A small joke helped break the ice.
exampleTranslation: ساعدت مزحة صغيرة على كسر حاجز الصمت.

definition: Sharing the same understanding or agreement.
example: Let's make sure we are on the same page.
exampleTranslation: لنتأكد من أننا متفقون في الفهم.

arabic: كشك؛ بسطة؛ حجرة؛ مربط؛ يتوقف؛ يتعطل؛ يماطل؛ فقدان قوة الرفع
definition: A noun or verb with several distinct meanings.

senses.definition: A small stand or booth where goods are sold.

examples.sourceText: She bought fruit from a market stall.
examples.translation: اشترت فاكهة من بسطة في السوق.

senses.definition: A small enclosed compartment, especially in a toilet or shower area.

examples.sourceText: The last shower stall is available.

senses.definition: An individual compartment for an animal in a stable or barn.

examples.sourceText: The horse waited calmly in its stall.

senses.definition: For an engine or vehicle, to stop running unexpectedly.

examples.sourceText: The car may stall if you release the clutch too quickly.
examples.translation: قد يتوقف محرك السيارة إذا حررت القابض بسرعة كبيرة.

senses.definition: To delay an action or avoid answering in order to gain time.

examples.sourceText: They tried to stall the negotiations.

senses.definition: A loss of aerodynamic lift caused by an excessive angle of attack.

examples.sourceText: The pilot lowered the nose to recover from the stall.
examples.translation: خفض الطيار مقدمة الطائرة للتعافي من فقدان قوة الرفع.
